_doc: Coverage sectional — Puzzles & Maps. Original rows for official RRB NTPC syllabus coverage.

questions.stem_en: A sits in the middle. B is at the left end. D sits between B and A. E sits to the right of A. Who sits at the right end?
questions.stem_hi: A middle में बैठा है। B left end पर है। D, B और A के बीच है। E, A के right में है। Right end पर कौन है?

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Stopped at the person immediately right of the middle, not the right end.
options.trap_reason_hi: Middle के immediate right वाले person पर रुक गए, right end नहीं देखा।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Picked the left end even though the question asks for the right end.
options.trap_reason_hi: Question right end पूछता है लेकिन left end चुन लिया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Picked the middle person instead of completing the row.
options.trap_reason_hi: Row complete करने की जगह middle person चुन लिया।

questions.explanation_method_en: Final order is B - D - A - E - C; right end is C. Therefore, answer = C.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Linear puzzle clues should be converted into a final row before answering. End positions and immediate-neighbour clues are common traps. Final answer is C.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Final order B - D - A - E - C है; right end C है। अतः answer = C।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Linear puzzle clues को final row में convert करें। End positions और immediate-neighbour clues common traps हैं। Final answer C है।

questions.stem_en: A map shows a point 6 km east and 8 km north from the start. What is the shortest distance from the start?
questions.stem_hi: Map में एक point start से 6 km east और 8 km north है। Start से shortest distance क्या है?

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Added path components and reported route length, not straight-line distance.
options.trap_reason_hi: Components add करके route length दे दी, straight-line distance नहीं।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Used only east displacement and ignored north displacement.
options.trap_reason_hi: सिर्फ east displacement लिया, north ignore किया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Used only north displacement and ignored east displacement.
options.trap_reason_hi: सिर्फ north displacement लिया, east ignore किया।

questions.explanation_method_en: Shortest distance = sqrt(6^2 + 8^2) = 10 km. Therefore, answer = 10 km.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Map distance between perpendicular directions is a Pythagoras problem. The direct distance is the hypotenuse, not the sum of the legs. Final answer is 10 km.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Shortest distance = sqrt(6^2 + 8^2) = 10 km। अतः answer = 10 km।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Perpendicular directions का map distance Pythagoras problem है। Direct distance hypotenuse होता है, legs का sum नहीं। Final answer 10 km है।
